creator: info@juanmolina.eu
text:
In a default install of Openbox the desktop starts at the correct resolution for my monitor (1366x768). Then I issue the following command to switch to a lower resolution:
% xrandr -s 720x400
The dimensions of the desktop do not change, so application windows and panel/taskbar (tint) are drawn partially off-screen. Xrandr was working perfectly before updating Openbox.

So, I think you have just to use xrandr to change to a lower resolution and check if Openbox adapt correctly the dimensions of the viewport. It could be a local problem (old ATI card, unusual resolution…).
